snippet: Split-site/multi-site allowances are paid to designated primary, P-12 and secondary colleges which are not being funded for a separate enrolment linked base ( Reference 2 ). Specialist and Language Schools are also eligible if applied criteria is satisfied. A school may be eligible for the allowance if: From 2026, the program will start being phased out and be fully phased out by 2029 and schools will receive 75% of their full funding entitlement in the 2026 SRP. Funding is calculated at the Indicative cycle and allocated through cash funding. Building Area Allowance (Reference 32) Reference 32 of the SRP Guide, providing information on the ...
